headline:
Pioneers of Irrigation &
Landscape in Kutch
description: The Directors of Jal Agritech India Private Limited were previously operating an irrigation business under the name Omnath Irrigation & Neelkanth Nursery. To strengthen its market presence and establish it as a recognized brand, Jal Agritech India Private Limited was incorporated in 2020. Since then, the company has been providing comprehensive irrigation, automation, landscaping nursery & agricultural solutions under a structured corporate framework. Omnath Irrigation & Neelkanth Nursery, founded and managed by the Directors of Jal Agritech India Private Limited, has been serving the irrigation & nursery sector for several years. In 2020, Jal Agritech India Private Limited was established to transform this business into a professional and trusted brand, delivering innovative irrigation, automation, landscaping, nursery and agricultural solutions across diverse sectors. To strengthen market presence and build a recognized corporate brand, Omnath Irrigation & Neelkanth Nursery was integrated into Jal Agritech India Private Limited. This strategic transition transformed a small proprietary business into a professionally managed company, enabling expanded operations, enhanced credibility, and the delivery of comprehensive irrigation, automation, landscaping, nursery and agricultural solutions under a unified brand identity. Omnath Irrigation & Neelkanth Nursery was merged with Jal Agritech India Private Limited to transform a small business into a strong and trusted corporate brand. This integration has helped expand the company's capabilities, improve service delivery, and establish a stronger presence in the irrigation, automation, and landscaping & nursery sectors.
